label: Cervical Rotation
instructions: Stand tall with your shoulders square to the camera. Turn your head fully toward the side being tested without stepping or shifting your shoulders.
capture_tips: Frame from chest to top of head.
Use a front-facing angle with the clavicles visible.
Pause briefly at the end of the turn.

label: Trunk Rotation
instructions: Stand with feet planted and arms crossed over your chest. Rotate your trunk toward the test side while keeping your lower body quiet.
capture_tips: Frame from hips to top of head.
Keep both feet visible if possible.

label: Forward Lunge
instructions: Step into a controlled forward lunge on the test side and return to start under control.
capture_tips: Use a side-front angle so knee tracking is visible.
Capture the full step and return.

label: Single Leg Dip
instructions: Balance on the test leg, perform a shallow dip, and return without touching the other foot down.
capture_tips: Keep the stance foot fully visible.

label: Shoulder Reach Behind Back
instructions: Reach one hand over the shoulder and the other behind the back. Test both top-hand configurations.
capture_tips: Frame from hips to top of head.
Use a rear or slight rear-oblique angle.
